_comment: Explicit growth allowances. Consumed-or-deleted: remove entry when offset by extraction.

prune-sync-outbox.reason: outbox pruning overhaul with eviction-index awareness (1.A5)

history-api-router-fn.reason: history API card-data source field passthrough (1.A6, +150); Field Journal Task 12: fieldJournalUxEnabled feature flag, visible touched-node catches, rejecting DB-close wrapper (+312); AgroLink Phase A: scoped_access feature flag (+75)

sync-pending-split.reason: Field Journal Task 11: preserve the trusted pending-command envelope alongside legacy flat routing fields

command-dedupe-dispatch.reason: Field Journal Task 10: shared command-ledger replay; PR #141 hardening: guarded osiLib loading and protected-type routing keep generic commands independent from optional journal hooks (+823 exact final delta vs origin/main)

cmd-type-registry.reason: 1.C: expanded command-type registry from 8 to 33 types

5f0d2b7e9b9b1b3a.reason: 5.6: scheduler backward-jump debounce (sameLogicalWindow) on both DENDRO + threshold paths + threshold suppression early return

dendro-compute-fn.reason: issue #10: INSERT OR REPLACE -> ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE upserts bumping sync_version (dendrometer_daily + zone_daily_recommendations); PR #140 review finding: add sync_version to the three inline fallback CREATE TABLE statements (+104)

sim-dendro-fn-setup.reason: issue #10: sim INSERT OR REPLACE -> ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE upserts bumping sync_version

sync-init-fn.reason: issue #10 trigger rewrites pass NEW.sync_version + AU gates; issue #4 gatewaySql escape fix; issue #5 chameleon_enabled added to trg_sync_devices_outbox_au WHEN clause + payload; issue #16 (+420) boot rewrites of trg_dp_device_data_outbox_ai + trg_dp_chameleon_readings_outbox_ai regain the seed's WHEN-clause gateway-EUI resolvability guard (trigger-body parity adjudication, Pattern A)

sync-bootstrap-build.reason: issue #5: devices SELECT gains chameleon_enabled + 3 depth columns (+102); PR #140 review finding: dendroDaily/zoneRecommendations/zoneEnvironments SELECTs gain sync_version (+79); Field Journal Task 12 plus final review: fail-closed 12-table readiness, tuple-watermark manifest, rejecting DB-close wrapper in normal bootstrap (+4078); PR #141 hardening: object-only outbox payload parser and rollback propagation (+139)

sync-outbox-build.reason: retryable backoff: pending-events SELECT gains a last_retryable_failure_at/retry_count cooldown-exclusion clause (Task J); PR #141 hardening: object-only payload parser, rollback propagation, strict delivery mapping, and visible cleanup catches (+397 vs current origin/main)

sync-outbox-mark.reason: retryable backoff: RETRYABLE_ERROR results now collect event uuids and persist retry_count/last_retryable_failure_at instead of only counting them (Task J)

sync-force-build.reason: issue #5: devices SELECT gains chameleon_enabled + 3 depth columns (+102); PR #140 review finding: dendroDaily/zoneRecommendations/zoneEnvironments SELECTs gain sync_version (+79); retryable backoff: same cooldown-exclusion SELECT clause + retry_count/last_retryable_failure_at UPDATE as sync-outbox-mark (+280, Task J); Field Journal Tasks 11-12 plus final review: preserve trusted envelopes, fail-closed 12-table readiness, tuple-watermark manifest, rejecting DB-close wrapper, and exposeEmptyCatches over main's Task J catches (+4936); PR #141 hardening: object-only outbox payload parser, rollback propagation, and strict delivery mapping (+100)

put-chameleon-enabled-auth-fn.reason: issue #5: UPDATE bumps sync_version so the enable toggle reaches the cloud

dendro-ref-tree-fn.reason: issue #15: UPDATE bumps sync_version so a reference-tree toggle after the first delivered DEVICE event does not hit equal_version_payload_conflict, matching the put-chameleon-enabled-auth-fn / dendro_enabled / temp_enabled / rain_gauge_enabled / flow_meter_enabled precedent

device-api-http500.reason: issue #9: adopt msg.error.statusCode instead of hardcoding 500, so auth failures (401) survive the responder

dendro-raw-fn.reason: issue #6: restore escaped backslashes in the corrupted toBase64Url regex (invalid /+/  and comment-swallowing ///), which the node needs to compile at all

auth-db-insert.reason: AgroLink Phase A Task 10: scoped-mode conditional bootstrap insert (single atomic write, spec §10); measured delta 1114 -> 2080 chars (+966); auth-fix CRITICAL: capture the INSERT's real this.changes instead of trusting a follow-up SELECT a same-username bootstrap-race loser would still satisfy, 2080 -> 2281 chars (+201)

auth-register-func.reason: auth-fix CRITICAL: credentials travel on msg._authwork instead of flow.set/flow.get (flow context is shared mutable state across concurrent requests), 644 -> 895 chars

auth-login-func.reason: auth-fix CRITICAL: credentials travel on msg._authwork instead of flow.set/flow.get, 472 -> 526 chars

auth-process-result.reason: auth-fix CRITICAL: read msg._authwork instead of flow.get for both register/login branches; convert getAuthSecret()'s two pre-existing empty catches to node.warn (touched-node silent-catch ratchet); add scoped-mode disabled-account login rejection before token issuance (Important finding), 5234 -> 5921 chars

total_allowance.reason: 1.A5 sync outbox hardening + 1.A6 history card-data + 1.C command-type registry expansion + 5.6 time integrity guards + heartbeat RTC fields + issue #10 upsert sync versioning + issue #9 device-api-http500 statusCode fix (+45) + issue #6 dendro-raw-fn regex fix (+10) + issue #5 chameleon_enabled sync (+349: sync-init-fn +99, sync-bootstrap-build +102, sync-force-build +102, put-chameleon-enabled-auth-fn +46) + issue #15 dendro-ref-tree-fn sync_version bump (+46) + issue #16 sync-init-fn EUI-resolvability guards restored to two boot triggers (+420, trigger-body parity adjudication Pattern A) + PR #140 review finding: sync_version added to 3 inline fallback CREATE TABLE statements in dendro-compute-fn (+104) and to dendroDaily/zoneRecommendations/zoneEnvironments SELECTs in sync-bootstrap-build + sync-force-build (+79 each, +158) (+262 total) + Field Journal Tasks 10-12 vs main @0f1361a3 (+11443: sync-bootstrap-build +4078, sync-force-build +4936, sync-pending-split +401, history-api-router-fn +312, new nodes journal-api-router-fn +489 and journal-command-apply-fn +1258; covered within this existing headroom) + PR #141 malformed-payload and STREGA calibration hardening (+1058 per profile: sync-bootstrap-build +139, sync-outbox-build +397, sync-force-build +100, write-strega-expectation +422) + PR #141 guarded journal helper loading (+2117 per profile: dedupe +627, apply +465, ACK queue +494, API router +531) + AgroLink Phase A auth-fix CRITICAL (credential cross-contamination + bootstrap race) plus scoped disabled-login block (+1193: auth-db-insert +201, auth-register-func +251, auth-login-func +54, auth-process-result +687)
